ticket.subject: Bonjour, nous regardons pour changer de transporte...
ticket.raw_subject: Bonjour, nous regardons pour changer de transporte...
ticket.description:
Bonjour, nous regardons pour changer de transporteur. Pour le moment vous n'offrez pas la liaison avec ce transporteur qui se nomme Delivro. Voici le lien de la documentation de l'API : https://api.dispatchscience.com/reference/test. Est-il envisageable de votre part à ajouter le transporteur à l'extension de PluginHive? Merci et bonne journée!

------------------
Envoyé de : https://mcsl-w.pluginhive.io/home/views/orders/status/allorders

comments.body:
Canada Store
CanPar account added
Order Count NA
10122 labels in March
Active from April 2024 and Yearly Premium plan selected

Hello, we are looking to switch carriers. Currently, you do not offer an integration with this carrier, which is named Delivro. Here is the link to the API documentation: https://api.dispatchscience.com/reference/test. Would it be possible for you to add this carrier to the PluginHive extension? Thank you, and have a great day!

comments.body:
Hello Cedric,

Good day!

For shipping from Canada, apart from CanPar we support Canada Post, Purolator, FedEx, UPS, DHL Express carriers.

Unfortunately, Delviro carrier is not supported and we do not have any plans currently to integrate any new carriers.

Let us know for any further queries.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Cedric,
 
Good day!

For shipping from Canada, apart from CanPar we support Canada Post, Purolator, FedEx, UPS, DHL Express carriers. 
 
Unfortunately, Delviro carrier is not supported and we do not have any plans currently to integrate any new carriers. 
 
Let us know for any further queries.
 
Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

Hello Cedric,

Thank you for sharing the contact details.

I checked the API Documentation link https://api.dispatchscience.com/reference/test and here it is mentioned as Dispatch Science system and could not see any mention related to Delivro carrier.

So, could you please check if this is the correct API documentation shared? If not, request you to share the correct documentation, so i can pass the details to our product team.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/vY4bZGJshWksAQZ9709qnjcEg/?name=image.png)

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Need an input from the team.

Customer Requirement - Integration with a new carrier "Delivro" (we currently do not support this carrier)

Current Process - Is using the plugin with CanPar carrier and moving on to the Delivro carrier

Additional Details - Customer has shared the API documentation and the contact details of a person from Delivro team (both are shared below). Customer is ready to pay an additional amount for this integration and is asking for an estimation of the cost.

API Documentation Link - https://api.dispatchscience.com/reference/test

Contact details of a carrier related person -
Name: Jean-François Girard
Cellphone: 514-269-4571
Email: jfgirard@delivro.ca

Current Activities -
Plugin used - WSS
Store URL - https://vapewolinak.com
Account ID - 3443d5eb-b34f-46b1-bf45-98ed14ca2f37
Order Count - NA
Current Carrier Used - CanPar
Label Count - 10449 labels in March and 9939 labels in Feb 2026
Active from April 2024 and Yearly Premium plan selected

comments.body:
**Next Steps:**

Ask Cédric to confirm the timeline and whether they are okay with waiting ~1 month for the integration. Once we have their confirmation, we can provide an estimated cost.

In the meantime, I've reached out to Jean from Delivro to gather more technical details and clarify the integration requirements.

(Abhilash)

comments.body:
Hello Cedric,

Good day!

Our team is looking for the possibilities to consider your requirement for Delviro carrier integration.

To proceed further, are you okay in waiting for the availability of this carrier integration for atleast 1 month? Once we have your confirmation on this, we can provide an estimated cost for the integration process.

Looking forward for your response.

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

Just to be sure. Would it take a month before the Delivro would be added to pluginHive or a month to check the availability and the possibilities of doing it? If that's not too much to ask, I would only need an approx of the price and delay to be done. With
 that information I could tell my client and he will take a decision. 
 


 
 
Have a nice day!

comments.body:
Hi Team,
**Please share the below response with Cedric on the ticket:**

* * *
Hi Cedric,

Thank you for your patience and for sharing all the details.

We’re glad to confirm that we can take up the integration of the Delivro carrier and proceed with the development.

To move forward, we would like to align on the commercial aspect. If a pricing of **$200/month** works for you, we would be happy to prioritize this integration and proceed accordingly.

Once we have your confirmation, we will share a detailed timeline for development along with the expected go-live.

We truly appreciate your collaboration and look forward to working closely with you to make this integration successful.

Looking forward to your thoughts.

(Abhilash)
comments.html_body:
Hi Team,
Please share the below response with Cedric on the ticket:
Hi Cedric,
 
Thank you for your patience and for sharing all the details.
 
We’re glad to confirm that we can take up the integration of the Delivro carrier and proceed with the development.
 
To move forward, we would like to align on the commercial aspect. If a pricing of $200/month works for you, we would be happy to prioritize this integration and proceed accordingly.
 
Once we have your confirmation, we will share a detailed timeline for development along with the expected go-live.
 
We truly appreciate your collaboration and look forward to working closely with you to make this integration successful.
 
Looking forward to your thoughts.
 
(Abhilash)
